1.signalAnswer: Stem signals (rủi ro đã/sắp xảy ra) → A: Consult the risk register for an appropriate planned risk response and implement.
whyBullets: A is correct: Risk đã identify — PM consult risk register và thực thi planned response thay vì phản ứng ngẫu nhiên.
PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Sửa kế hoạch có thể cần thiết nhưng PM nên tham chiếu artifact hiện có (risk register, change control, baseline) trước khi tự ý điều chỉnh.
excludeReasons.C: Thay đổi phạm vi cần quy trình change control và thống nhất stakeholder — không phải phản ứng mặc định khi gặp trở ngại.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi NEXT — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

whyBullets: D is correct: PM trao quyền team tự quyết trong phạm vi phù hợp — Build an empowered culture.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần trao quyền / để team tự quyết.
excludeReasons.B: Micromanage thay vì trao quyền team tự quyết.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Suggested to the team to add impediments as work items in the product backlog to be fixed in th) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Empowered the team to improve their processes, tools, and interactions to be more effective in) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

973.signalAnswer: SME believes teamwork is demotivating and slows them down while wanting the highest-quality output — misconception about Agile; PM should explain continuous improvement and early feedback loops before EQ coaching, ceremonies, or sponsor escalation.
whyBullets: Signal: SME thinks teamwork is demotivating and slows them down — Agile misconception; PM explains value before ceremonies or escalation.
B is correct: teamwork + continuous improvement + early feedback loops help the expert achieve higher-quality output than working alone — Develop Team + Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8 p. 112: when members are unsure how to collaborate, PM assesses team needs and coaches directly (servant leadership), not escalate to sponsor.

excludeReasons.A: Recommending EQ development judges attitude — does not explain why Agile teamwork does not reduce quality.
excludeReasons.C: Assigning retrospective observer role before SME joins the team — explain CI + early feedback first.
excludeReasons.D: Escalating to sponsor for attitude — too heavy; PM coaches and explains value directly first.

excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi NEXT — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: to conduct face-to-face meetings and discussions. Virtual meetings
low performance. What should the project manager do
to unforeseen circumstances, a contractor was unable to
1417.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.
D is correct: recurring check-ins keep internationally dispersed team connected and aligned (Develop Team + Build an empowered culture).
PMBOK 8: Develop Team focuses on team interaction and environment — ongoing cadence beats one-off kickoff for sustained engagement.

excludeReasons.A: One kickoff meeting does not sustain ongoing engagement for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement key performance indicators (KPIs) and convince the contractor to engage the team.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Reassess continually to remove blockers for the team.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
